items.title: Shirt
items.desc: A fan wanted a custom shirt with multiple textures for their Nova - this also has blend shapes and relevant physics.

items.title: Bandos
items.desc: Bandos Chestplate and Shoulder piece, and Party crown, from Runescape. Modeled and textured from scratch, for a Deira.

items.title: Robe and Mask
items.desc: A custom, fully from scratch robe and facemask. The robe has physics, and the facemask supports face tracking, expressions, visemes, and other blend shapes. The bells on the antlers have physics as well - the clappers swing seperately. I did not model the antlers - this was for a Feyrin base.

items.title: Staff
items.desc: My custom staff for Furality Somna - It's world-droppable, casts spells which can be left in world space, has animated bits and bobs, and the chain has physics!

items.title: Suit
items.desc: I modeled, textured, and rigged this suit from scratch, for a base (Daltosphynx) which doesn't have a lot of clothing options out there. This is very early work, but it's a great example of my specialty -  I love making new stuff for obscure bases!

items.title: Lido's Room
items.desc: My personal homeworld. Light Volumes, LTCGI, VizVid, pens, rain sounds and a soothing crackling fire. Pictures I took myself in Oregon, and books laying around I recommend :)
